prompt:
[STYLE CONTEXT]
Documentary-style photorealism, handheld aesthetics, restrained film grain, natural color timing, archival texture, privacy-preserving framing with silhouettes and back-views. Color palette: #2b2f36, #1c1f24, #4a90e2, #7a5a3f, #6a8a90, #e6d5c2. Lighting: Key light ~5200K from 45° upper-left with diffusion; fill at 25-35% around 3200K for warmth; strong backlight to carve silhouettes; practicals and street spill for atmosphere. Camera: 35mm prime at f/4; handheld or shoulder rig; eye-level to slight high angle; rule-of-thirds framing with leading lines and occasional slow push-ins. Subtle archival grain with a gentle vignette.

[SCENE CONTENT]
Café terrace in Toulouse, half-finished coffees, sunlight on table, empty chairs suggesting just-vacated meeting

[TECHNICAL]
Render as documentary-style photorealism. Maintain cinematic composition and lighting throughout.

[SCENE CONTENT]
Typed witness statement excerpt with the line highlighted in yellow, date stamp 1997, case file margin notes

[VINTAGE TREATMENT]
Period-accurate archival aesthetic. Yellowed or aged paper, worn edges, print imperfections, slight fading. If photograph: analog film grain, era-appropriate color degradation 1980s to 1990s. No digital artifacts. Authentic archival document quality.

[TECHNICAL]
Macro or close-up photography of physical document or photograph. Sharp focus on text and key details. Soft vignette at edges.
negativePrompt: cartoon, illustration, painting, 3d render, cgi, drawing, anime, oversaturated, artificial lighting, bokeh, blurry, distorted, smooth plastic look, digital artifacts, hdr, unrealistic shadows
